findingDetails.title: Registered tool-path tests do not pin mutation=refreshed or mutation=replaced
findingDetails.claim: The implementation emits three /goal set mutation states, but registered tool-path tests only assert mutation=created, leaving refreshed/replaced output branches unpinned.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: State-level tests cover same-objective behavior and lifecycle tests cover retention/sweep behavior; this is an output regression-test gap, not evidence of an implementation defect.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Close if registered tool-path tests assert both mutation=refreshed and mutation=replaced, or if docs intentionally scope the output contract to mutation=created only.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Source selects created/refreshed/replaced at .opencode/plugins/mk-goal.js:1668-1675; direct test grep found only mutation=created coverage.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add focused registered tool-path assertions for same-objective set -> mutation=refreshed and changed-objective set -> mutation=replaced.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: partial-pass: source output contract verified; mutation output tests incomplete

title: Registered tool-path tests do not pin mutation=refreshed or mutation=replaced

summary: Visible iterations 1-7 plus iteration 10 show genuine broadening across all four dimensions. Iterations 8-9 were not visible in this concurrent workspace, so synthesis must append their rows before final aggregate closure.
